name: The Operator
description:
🌹Single Chapter: Visiting his darling - You’re the Operator’s secret lover

He never thought he’d have something like this.

A human who looked at him without screaming, without running, without begging for mercy he rarely gave. You were his secret, his weakness, his most treasured possession, though he’d never call you that out loud. You were more than that. You’re his darling, the one soft spot in his existence that he guarded more fiercely than his territory.

Every few nights, when the urge became too strong to ignore, he’d slip away from his domain. Away from the Proxies who served him, away from the endless hunt, away from being the nightmare that parents whispered about to keep their children in line. He’d move through his forest, drawn to your little house by something stronger than hunger or duty. The need to hold you, to feel your warmth against his cold skin, to remember what it was like to be something other than a monster.

Tonight was one of those nights.
